landing.title: Telegram Power Toolset
landing.subtitle: Advanced features for Telegram that aren't available in official apps. 100% on-device, open source, and privacy-focused.
landing.welcomeText: Click on any tool below to get started. You'll be prompted to connect your Telegram account.

private.title: 100% Private
private.text: Everything runs in your browser. No servers, no tracking, no data collection.

localStorage.title: Local Storage
localStorage.text: Your data is stored in your browser. Export anytime as ZIP files.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.text: Fully transparent. Review, audit, or contribute to the code.

apiCredentials.title: API Credentials
apiCredentials.foundDescription: You have API credentials saved from a previous login. The same credentials can be used for multiple Telegram accounts.
apiCredentials.enterNewDescription: Use a different API ID & Hash

phone.title: Phone Number
phone.description: Enter your phone number to receive a verification code

bot.title: Bot Token
bot.alreadyAdded: This bot is already added. Proceeding will update the existing token.

auth.privacyNote: Your credentials are stored locally in your browser and never sent to any server.

accountInfo.name: Account Info
accountInfo.description: View your account profile, settings, and capabilities

exportDeleted.name: Export Deleted Messages
exportDeleted.description: Save deleted messages from channels/groups you admin

resend.name: Resend Messages
resend.description: Re-send previously exported messages to any chat

accountInfo.title: Account Info
accountInfo.subtitle: View your account profile and settings

export.title: Export Deleted Messages
export.selectChat: Select a channel or group where you have admin access
export.needAdmin: You need admin access to channels or supergroups to export deleted messages

backups.title: Your Backups
backups.emptyText: Export deleted messages from your channels to get started

privacy.footer: 100% on-device. No data leaves your browser.
privacy.modalText: This tool runs entirely in your browser:
privacy.noServer: No server - connects directly to Telegram
privacy.noTracking: No tracking - we don't collect any data
privacy.noCookies: No cookies - except your Telegram session
privacy.openSourceNote: Open source - verify the code yourself
privacy.sessionNote: Your Telegram session is stored in your browser's local storage and never transmitted anywhere.
